summary: High‑quality soundboard capture of a mesmerizing show highlighted by emotional performances of Cold Rain & Snow and Morning Dew.
review: The recording is praised as the most complete soundboard source available, with only minor anomalies such as a patch at the end. Musically the concert keeps listeners engaged from start to finish, featuring Jerry’s soaring guitar on Cold Rain & Snow and a “cranking” Morning Dew, while set 2 is described as terrific.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical performance (standout songs, consistent energy) combined with a generally good soundboard recording; minor technical quirks keep the rating just below top‑tier.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Most complete SBD to date, clear overall but contains a patch at the end and some minor anomalies; no major drop‑outs reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert maintains interest throughout, with an especially terrific second set that keeps the audience engaged.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Emotional, on‑point playing highlighted on Cold Rain & Snow and Morning Dew.
band_member_comments.Bob: Strong rhythm guitar/vocals noted as 'on' throughout the show.
